ping.description: Health check. Returns game status, map presence, colonist count, speed, and timestamp.

read_colonists.description: Get detailed info on all free colonists: name, position, health, mood, job, backstories, traits, disabled work, and skills.

returns.colonists: [{name, position: {x, z}, health, mood, currentJob, mentalState, isDrafted, childhood, childhoodDesc, adulthood, adulthoodDesc, traits: [{name, description}], disabledWork, skills: [{name, level, passion}]}]

read_resources.description: Get colony resource counts (all ThingDefs with count > 0).

returns.<defName>: int (count for each resource with count > 0)

read_map.description: Get basic map info: size, biome, average fertility, home cell count, season, and hour.

read_map_tiles.description: Full tile-level map snapshot. Returns base64-encoded terrain/fertility/roof/fog grids, sparse things list, and cell designations. Clamped to 50x50 per request.

returns.terrainPalette: [str] (defName list, index = byte value in terrain grid)
returns.things: [{x, z, kind, def, label, ...extra per kind}]

read_buildings.description: Get all colony buildings (including spots) and enclosed rooms with stats.

returns.buildings: [{def, label, position: {x, z}, hitPoints, maxHitPoints, isSpot}]
returns.rooms: [{role, cellCount, roofed, openRoofCount, temperature, impressiveness, beauty, cleanliness, contents: [defName], flooredPct, bounds: {minX, maxX, minZ, maxZ}}]

read_weather.description: Get current weather, temperature, season, and time of day.

read_research.description: Get current research project, progress, completed list, and available projects.

read_zones.description: Get all zones with type, label, cell count, bounds, and type-specific data (plant for grow zones, priority for stockpiles).

returns.zones: [{type, label, cellCount, bounds: {minX, maxX, minZ, maxZ}, plant?: str, priority?: str}]

read_bills.description: Get all workbenches and their bill queues.

returns.workbenches: [{def, label, position: {x, z}, bills: [{index, recipe, label, suspended}]}]

read_threats.description: Get all hostile pawns and active fires on the map.

returns.threats: [{type: 'hostile'|'fire', name?, kind?, faction?, position: {x, z}, health?, downed?}]

read_work_priorities.description: Get work priority settings for all colonists (by WorkTypeDef, -1 = disabled).

read_animals.description: Get all animals on the map with tame/bonded/downed status.

returns.animals: [{name, kind, position: {x, z}, health, tame, bonded, downed}]

read_pawns.description: Get overview of all pawns: colonists (with draft status), prisoners, guests, plus hostile/animal counts.

read_needs.description: Get all needs for a specific pawn.

read_inventory.description: Get a pawn's equipment, worn apparel, and carried inventory.

read_colonist_needs.description: Get mood/food/rest/joy/beauty/comfort levels for all colonists.

returns.colonists: [{name, mood, food, rest, joy, beauty, comfort}]

read_thoughts.description: Get all mood thoughts for a specific pawn with mood offset and duration.

read_letters.description: Get all pending letters (notifications) with index, label, type, text, and quest flag.

read_dialogs.description: Get all open dialog windows with type, ID, and options (for Dialog_NodeTree).

returns.dialogs: [{type, id, title?, text?, options?: [{text, disabled?, disabledReason?}]}]

read_beauty.description: Read per-cell beauty values in a region (max 50x50). Returns average and non-zero cells.

read_messages.description: Read live top-of-screen messages (e.g. 'food rotted', 'construction failed').

read_terrain.description: Read terrain data for a region (max 50x50). Returns per-cell terrain defName, fertility, water, and rock flags.

read_roof.description: Read roof status for a region (max 50x50).

returns.cells: [{x, z, roof}] (roof is defName or null)

read_costs.description: Get material costs and work amount for a building defName.

stuff.description: Stuff material defName (auto-picks default if building requires stuff)

read_interaction_spots.description: Get interaction cells for buildings in a region. Useful for checking clearance before building.

read_ideology.description: Read ideology info: name, memes, roles and their assignments. Requires Ideology DLC.

read_visitors.description: Read visitors and traders on map, plus incoming caravans.

returns.visitors: [{faction, count, isTrader, traderName?, traderKind?, goods?: [{def, label, count, value}], pawns: [{name, position: {x,z}, isTrader}]}]

read_colony_stats.description: Colony wealth breakdown, average beauty, room impressiveness summary.

read_plants.description: Returns harvestable plants on the map (berry bushes, mature crops, etc.).

read_food_log.description: Returns recent food consumption events from the in-memory ring buffer (last 50). Always active.

read_water.description: Find water bodies on the map. Clusters water cells into bodies (river/lake/marsh). Alias for find_water.

read_grow_spot.description: Find the best contiguous growable rectangle near a point. Alias for find_grow_spot.

size.description: Side length of square to find

find_water.description: Find water bodies on the map. Clusters water cells into bodies (river/lake/marsh).

find_grow_spot.description: Find the best contiguous growable rectangle near a point.

size.description: Side length of square to find

find_clear_rect.description: Find a clear rectangular area for building (no rock, water, or existing buildings). Returns closest to center.

survey_region.description: Statistical summary of a map region: terrain counts, water/rock/buildable tiles, avg fertility, roof breakdown, thing counts.

survey_terrain_ascii.description: ASCII grid of terrain types. scale>1 downsamples (majority vote per block).

scale.description: Downsample factor (each char = scale x scale block)

survey_roof_ascii.description: ASCII grid of roof coverage (open sky, thin roof, overhead mountain).

survey_fertility_ascii.description: ASCII grid of soil fertility levels.

survey_things_ascii.description: ASCII grid of things (buildings, items, pawns, plants). Highest-priority thing per cell wins.

survey_composite_ascii.description: ASCII grid overlaying things on terrain. Things override terrain when present.

survey_detailed_ascii.description: Richly detailed ASCII grid with named entities, zone overlays, item types, and furniture detail. Includes entity legend with positions.

returns.entities: [{type, char, name, x, z, job?, tame?}]

survey_beauty_ascii.description: ASCII grid of beauty levels (very ugly to gorgeous).

survey_temperature_ascii.description: ASCII grid of temperature zones (freezing to hot).

survey_blueprint_ascii.description: ASCII grid showing construction progress: built walls/doors, blueprints, and frames.

survey_power_ascii.description: ASCII grid of power infrastructure: generators, consumers, batteries, conduits.

survey_task_ascii.description: ASCII grid of active designations/tasks: mine, chop, harvest, hunt, haul, deconstruct, etc.

set_priority.description: Set a colonist's work type priority (1=highest, 4=lowest, 0=disabled).

set_schedule.description: Set a colonist's 24-hour schedule. Array of 24 entries: 'sleep', 'work', 'joy'/'recreation', or 'anything'.

draft.description: Draft a colonist (enable direct control for combat/movement).

undraft.description: Undraft a colonist (return to autonomous work).

add_bill.description: Add a production bill to a workbench. Supports position targeting and broadcasting to all matching workbenches.

x.description: Target workbench at this x position

z.description: Target workbench at this z position

target_all.description: If true, add bill to ALL matching workbenches

cancel_bill.description: Remove a bill from a workbench by index.

suspend_bill.description: Suspend or unsuspend a bill on a workbench.

build.description: Place a building blueprint (or instant-place for no-cost items like spots). Validates placement against rock, water, impassable buildings, and interaction spots.

y.description: Z coordinate (wire name is 'y' for historical reasons)

stuff.description: Stuff material defName (auto-picks default if required)

cancel_build.description: Cancel a blueprint or frame at a position.

bulk_build.description: Place multiple building blueprints in one request. Each op uses same params as 'build'. Continues on per-op errors.

ops.description: List of build op dicts [{blueprint, x, y, stuff?, rotation?}]

set_floor.description: Designate floor placement over a rectangle (or single tile). Skips cells that already match.

hunt.description: Designate up to 5 animals of a species for hunting. Skips tame animals.

designate_chop.description: Designate all trees within radius of a point for chopping.

designate_harvest.description: Designate harvestable non-tree plants within radius for harvesting. Optional defName filter.

designate_mine.description: Designate mineable rock in a rectangle for mining.

create_grow_zone.description: Create a growing zone in a rectangle. Skips cells with no fertility, water, overhead mountain, impassable things, or existing zones.

create_stockpile_zone.description: Create a stockpile zone in a rectangle. Steals cells from existing zones if needed.

priority.description: StoragePriority enum value (Low, Normal, Preferred, Important, Critical)

create_fishing_zone.description: Create a fishing zone on water cells (requires fishing mod). Skips non-water and already-zoned cells.

seed_fish.description: Seed fish population in a water body (Odyssey DLC). Sets population count and enables fish spawning.

x.description: X of a water cell in the target body

z.description: Z of a water cell in the target body

unpause.description: Unpause the game. Defaults to ultrafast speed. Also auto-dismisses ImmediateWindow dialogs.

name.description: Save file name (defaults to permadeath name or 'CarolineSave')

load_game.description: Load a save file. Queued asynchronously via LongEventHandler -- TCP connection will drop.

list_saves.description: List all .rws save files, sorted by last modified descending.

move_pawn.description: Order a drafted pawn to move to a position (Goto job).

attack.description: Order a drafted pawn to attack a target (by name or position). Uses ranged or melee based on equipped weapon.

rescue.description: Order a pawn to rescue a downed pawn and carry them to a bed.

tend.description: Order a pawn to tend (provide medical care to) a target pawn. If no target, tends self.

haul.description: Order a pawn to haul an item at a position to valid storage.

equip.description: Order a pawn to equip a weapon or wear apparel. Find by position or defName.

thing.description: ThingDef defName to find on map

prioritize.description: Force a pawn to immediately start a job of the given work type.

tame.description: Designate a wild animal for taming (fuzzy match on defName/kindDef).

slaughter.description: Designate a tame animal for slaughter.

deconstruct.description: Designate a building at a position for deconstruction.

cancel_designation.description: Cancel all designations at a single cell (both cell-based and thing-based).

cancel_designations.description: Cancel designations in a rectangular area. Optional kind filter: chop, harvest, mine, deconstruct, hunt, haul.

kind.description: Designation kind filter: chop, harvest, mine, deconstruct, hunt, haul (null = all)

forbid.description: Forbid items at a position, by defName, or all items on map.

thingDef.description: Forbid all items of this defName

all.description: Set to any value to forbid all items on map

unforbid.description: Unforbid items at a position, by defName, or all items on map.

thingDef.description: Unforbid all items of this defName

all.description: Set to any value to unforbid all items on map

set_research.description: Set the current research project (by defName or label).

set_plant.description: Change the plant type grown in a growing zone.

delete_zone.description: Delete a zone at a cell, or delete all grow zones if no position given.

x.description: Cell x (omit to delete all grow zones)

remove_zone_cells.description: Remove cells from zones in a rectangular area or single cell. Zones that lose all cells are auto-deleted.

camera_jump.description: Jump the camera to a map position.

place.description: Instantly spawn a thing (building/item) at a position, owned by the player. Bypasses normal construction.

open_letter.description: Open a letter by index, triggering its dialog if applicable.

choose_option.description: Choose an option in the topmost Dialog_NodeTree by index. May navigate to a new node or execute an action.

close_dialog.description: Close a dialog window. Can target specific type or close topmost. Handles naming dialogs with factionName/settlementName params.

set_manual_priorities.description: Toggle manual (1-4) vs simple (on/off) work priority mode.

enabled.description: true = manual priorities (1-4), false = simple toggle

set_stockpile_filter.description: Modify a stockpile's storage filter: allow/disallow ThingDefs, categories, or special filters. Supports bulk allow_all/disallow_all.

x.description: Cell x to find stockpile (alternative to zone)

allow_all.description: Allow all items first (then apply disallow)

disallow_all.description: Disallow all items first (then apply allow)

add_plan.description: Place planning designations over a rectangle (visual markers, no gameplay effect).

remove_plan.description: Remove planning designations from a rectangle.

assign_role.description: Assign an ideology role to a pawn. Unassigns current holder if at max count. Requires Ideology DLC.

dev_set_storyteller.description: Change the storyteller and/or difficulty setting.

dev_toggle_incidents.description: Toggle random storyteller incidents (raids, events, weather) on or off.

enable.description: true = disable incidents, false = enable incidents (inverted naming -- 'enable' means 'enable the blocker')

spawn_animals.description: Spawn wild animals on the map at runtime. Optional position and manhunter mode.

manhunter.description: If true, spawned animals are manhunter
